summary: Test suite covers all major functions and requirements with clear organization. Pester tests verify happy paths (ConvertFrom-JUnitXml, ConvertFrom-TestJson, Get-AggregatedResults, New-MarkdownSummary, Invoke-Aggregator) and include some error cases (missing files, missing JSON fields) plus flaky-test detection. Run-ActTests.ps1 adds robust workflow integration testing through Act with exact value assertions. However, coverage of edge cases is limited: no tests for empty files, malformed XML/JSON beyond single missing-field cases, special characters in test names, boundary numeric values, duration aggregation correctness, GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY behavior, or unusual but valid inputs. Only ~2 out of 11 Pester tests focus on error/edge scenarios; most test happy paths. Design is good (clear naming, proper Describe blocks, fixture reuse, cleanup) but could benefit from parameterized tests and helper assertions. Adequate for detecting basic regressions but insufficient rigor for production use.
